title: Fabulous Blade
description: Adds new swords with different types and mechanics. Compatible with Better Combat for unique attack styles!
body:
# **Fabulous Blades - V1.0.1**  

![Image Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/G-Arantd/FabulousBlades/refs/heads/main/.images/Banner-Site.png)  

## **🗡️ Forge Your Path to Glory!**  

**Fabulous Blades** continues to evolve, refining its combat system and adding new mechanics for a deeper gameplay experience. If you seek variety, strategy, and style in battles, this is the perfect mod for you!  

### 🆕 **What's New in V1.0.1:**  

✅ **Sword Balancing:** All swords now follow a structured damage formula for better balance.  
✅ **New Katana Combo:** The Katana now features a brand-new attack combo for fluid combat.  
✅ **New Attributes for Reforges:** Reforges now grant **Critical Chance** and **Critical Damage**.  
✅ **Improved Crafting System:** Enhanced compatibility with other mods and potential add-ons.  
✅ **Visual Update:** The Claymore has received minor aesthetic improvements.  
✅ **New Requirement:** The mod now **requires Apothic Attributes (AttributesLib)** for unique sword attributes.  

### ⚠️ **WARNING**  
**Apothic Attributes (AttributesLib) is required!**  
Click the button below to download:  

[![Download Apothic Attributes](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-Apothic%20Attributes-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes)  

### 🔧 **Improvements & Fixes:**  

🔹 Optimized sword crafting for better mod integration.  
🔹 Improved balance for a more immersive combat experience.  

## **⚔️ Choose Your Blade!**  

### 🛡️ **Claymore – Unleash Raw Power!**  
A heavy two-handed sword capable of devastating wide-area strikes. Perfect for those who charge into battle, striking multiple enemies at once.  

### ⚡ **Katana – Deadly Speed!**  
Inspired by legendary Japanese blades, the Katana is light, swift, and lethal. Its rapid slashes allow you to overwhelm foes before they can react. Now with a new attack combo!  

### ⚖️ **Longblade – The Perfect Balance!**  
Not too heavy, not too light – the Longblade is ideal for those who seek versatility. With good reach and consistent damage, it's an excellent all-around choice.  

## 🏆 **How to Forge These Swords?**  

To craft these legendary weapons, you'll need to find **Reforge Templates**, which can be obtained in the following locations:  
📍 **Abandoned Mineshafts** – Explore dark and dangerous caves.  
🏺 **Desert Pyramids** – Brave the traps and uncover ancient secrets.  
🌿 **Jungle Temples** – Solve mysterious challenges for valuable rewards.  
🏠 **Weaponsmith Houses** – A reliable place to find useful materials.  

## 🔗 **Compatibility & Requirements**  

📌 **Better Combat:** Highly recommended for a more immersive combat system.  
📌 **Apothic Attributes (AttributesLib) Required:** Adds exclusive attributes for swords.  
📌 **Works in Any World:** No need to start a new game to enjoy the mod!  

## 🌍 **Why Use Fabulous Blades?**  

⭐ **Unique Combat Styles:** Each sword offers a distinct gameplay experience.  
⭐ **Exploration & Progression:** Find rare materials and enhance your adventure.  
⭐ **Vanilla-Friendly Expansion:** Designed to blend seamlessly into Minecraft's world.
